Advancement Screenshot.description: 📸 [Client] Takes a screenshot every time an advancement is achieved. Document your progress!

Adventure Mode Tweaks.description: 🏰 Various Adventure Mode mechanic improvements! Paintings, Item Frames, Minecarts, Boats and more.

All Loot Drops.description: 👝 Living entities drop all their possible loot in a configurable amount, looting enchant supported.

Altered Damage.description: 🔪 Alters damage taken and dealt by players and other entities with a modifier.

Alternative World Save Location.description: 📍 Allows changing the default save file path of Minecraft worlds to outside instance scopes.

Always a Wither Skull.description: ☠ Makes wither skeletons always drop their skull on death.

Anvil Restoration.description: 🔨 Repair placed anvils with iron ingots and damage them with obsidian.

April Fools.description: 🃏 Enables various silly and funny configurable features on April Fools' day!

Areas.description: ✍️ Create custom named regions/towns/zones with a radius using signs, with join/leave messages via GUI.

Automatic Doors.description: 🚪 Automatically opens doors around the player and closes them with a configurable delay.

Automatic Operator.description: 🤖 Automatically makes all or specific players OP in server environments when they log in.

Bareback Horse Riding.description: 🐎 Allows riding horses without a saddle with tweaked game mechanics.

Beautified Chat [Client].description: 💬 A highly configurable mod to change the chat style and colour on the client.

Beautified Chat [Server].description: 💬 A highly configurable mod to change the style and colour of chat messages server-wide.

Better Beacon Placement.description: ✔️ Easily place beacon bases by right-clicking the beacons with mineral blocks.

Better Conduit Placement.description: ✔️ Place conduits in front, makes placing conduit prismarine blocks easier and other tweaks.

Better Spawner Control.description: ✔️ Disables mob spawners whenever they are surrounded by 5 torches.

Bigger Sponge Absorption Radius.description: 🧽 Each extra sponge block placed next to one another increases the water absorption radius.

Biome Spawn Point.description: 🌲 Allows specifying which biome players will spawn in on new world creation.

Bogged Spawn.description: 🏹🍄 Adds a chance for bogged to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a skeleton.

Bottle Your Xp.description: 🍾 Allows the creation of experience bottles (bottles o' enchanting) from your own gathered xp.

Bottled Air.description: 🍾 Allows players to breathe in empty glass bottles under water for more oxygen.

Bouncier Beds.description: 🛏 Makes players bounce configurably higher on beds and prevents fall damage on them.

Breedable Killer Rabbit.description: 🐰 Makes the killer rabbit/bunny tamable and available by breeding.

Breeze Spawn.description: 💨 Adds a chance for breezes to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a blaze.

Campfire Spawn and Tweaks.description: 🔥 Respawn interdimensionally with short fire resistance inside a preferred campfire with altered block mechanics. Place unlit, lighting it will create a home camp spawn point. Remove waterlogging.

Cave Spider Spawn.description: 🕷️ Adds a chance for cave spiders to spawn naturally underground instead of a spider.

Chorus Fruit Drops Nearby.description: 🍇 When breaking chorus plants, all chorus fruit will drop at the base position.

Collective.description: 🎓 Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods.

Compact Help Command.description: 🗜 Modifies the /help command to show all information, be colourful and have multiple pages.

Conduits Prevent Drowned.description: ❌ Disables drowned zombie spawns around the player when the conduit effect is active.

Configurable Despawn Timer.description: ✏️ Allows items and experience orbs to remain longer, shorter or infinitely on the ground.

Configurable Extra Mob Drops.description: ✏️ Add any extra item drops to entities via commands and config, drop chance supported.

Configurable Furnace Burn Time.description: ✏️ Allows changing the fuel burn time in furnaces globally via a config modifier.

Configurable Mob Potion Effects.description: ✏️ Set potion effects for all living entities to have permanently and to inflict.

Creative Block Replacer.description: 🔄 Allows easy switching in between placing and replacing blocks in creative mode.

Crying Ghasts.description: 😭 Ghasts drop their tears periodically when a player is close, allowing sustainable farming.

Crying Portals.description: 🟣 Allows the creation of nether portals with crying obsidian blocks.

Current Game Music Track.description: 🎵 [Client] Temporarily show the song title of what's currently playing via the GUI.

Custom Credits.description: ©️ Allows changing the content and behaviour of the credits screen, including the end poem.

Cycle Paintings.description: 🖼️ Easily cycle through placed paintings by right-clicking them with another painting in hand.

Cycle Title Screen Splash.description: 💦 The splash text on the main menu will keep changing after a configurable delay.

Daily Quests.description: 🧭 Complete randomly generated quests each day for experience and loot!

Death Backup.description: 💾 Creates back-ups of player inventories before death, which can be loaded via commands.

Delete Invisibility On Movement (Bukkit).description: Simple plugin that removes the Invisible Potion from your server.

Despawning Eggs Hatch.description: 🥚 Chicken eggs on hay blocks hatch safely into chicks just before they despawn.

Difficulty Lock.description: 🔒 Sets a difficulty in any world, optionally locked, or force a hardcore mode requirement.

Dismount Entity.description: 🚏 Allows players to dismount/remove/exit entities/mobs from mounted entities without breaking them.

Double Doors.description: 🚪 Multiple identical double doors, trapdoors and fence gates can be opened simultaneously.

Dragon Drops Elytra.description: 🐉 A minimalistic mod that makes the Ender Dragon drop an elytra on death.

Easy Elevators.description: 🛗 Easily go up and down fast via multiblock elevators! Highly configurable, using existing resources.

Easy Elytra Takeoff.description: 🛫 Allows easy takeoff by elytra/colytra with a firework from the ground without jumping.

Edible Blaze Powder (Forge).description: Allows players to eat blaze powder and receive a short, configurable, strength bonus.

Edible Glowstone (Forge).description: Allows players to eat glowstone dust, which causes entities around to glow with an outline.

Edible Magma Cream (Forge).description: Allows players to eat magma cream and receive short, configurable, fire resistance.

Edible Sugar (Forge).description: Allows players to eat sugar and receive a short, configurable, speed bonus.

Edibles.description: 🍽 Makes lots of ingredients edible, after which the player receives a short status effect. Allows eating blaze powder, glowstone dust, magma cream, sugar, ghast tear, phantom membrane and rabbit's foot.

Enchanting Commands.description: 💫 Easy creation of (modded) enchanted items via commands with levels above the default limit.

Enchantment Level Cap Indicator.description: ⭐ Displays a symbol next to enchanted item tooltips when they reach their max level.

End Portal Recipe.description: 📝 Makes the end portal craftable, movable and available in survival plus other tweaks.

Entity Information.description: ℹ️ Displays entity information on hit with the Information Stick. Useful for debugging and developing.

Eroding Stone Entities.description: 🌊 Stone-type block entities left in flowing water turn into clay and sand.

Extended Bone Meal.description: ☘ Extends bonemeal behaviour. Instant grow with sneak, grow netherwart+cacti+sugarcane and other tweaks.

Extended Creative Inventory.description: 👜 Adds all items which by default aren't in the creative inventory to a tab.

Extract Poison.description: 🐍 Extract poison from cave spiders, pufferfish and bees with an empty glass bottle.

FAB Library (Forge).description: The Find A Block Library assists in finding/keeping track of blocks in a world efficiently.

Fall Through Slime.description: 🟩 Slime blocks no longer support your weight when idle, and you'll slowly fall through.

Faster Crouching.description: 🏃 Sprint and walk while crouching/sneaking at the speed of as if you weren't.

Fire Spread Tweaks.description: 🔥 Disables the default firespread and makes fire go out after a configurable delay.

First Join Message.description: 💬 Sends players who join a world for the first time a configurable message.

Fish On The Line.description: 🐟 Rings a bell held in the offhand when something's on the line while fishing.

Fixed Anvil Repair Cost.description: 💰 Patches the anvil to set the default level cost, material cost and percentage repaired.

Flower Mimics.description: 👻 SpookyJam 2023: Be careful around flowers at night.. they might transform into monsters!

Followers Teleport Too.description: 🐺 Whenever a player is teleported via a command, pets will be teleported alongside them.

Full Brightness Toggle.description: 🔆 [Client] Press G to toggle the brightness/gamma in-game to maximum and get fullbright night vision.

Furnace Recycle.description: 🔨 All metal-containing items are recyclable in a furnace and return raw materials.

Giant Spawn.description: 🧟‍♂️ Allows giants to spawn naturally with custom AI (based on zombies) and other tweaks.

Global Narration Toggle.description: 🗣️ Makes the narrator setting global automatically, across instances. Turns the screen off and on.

Grabby Mobs.description: 👾 Allows all mobs which can carry equipment to pick up items from the floor.

Grass Seeds.description: 🌱 Allows players to use normal seeds to transform dirt into (tall) grass.

Grindstone Sharper Tools.description: ⚔ The grindstone (wet stone) can temporarily increase the damage of tools used on it.

GUI Clock.description: ⏰ [Client] Shows the time/days played in the GUI/HUD with a clock in the inventory.

GUI Compass.description: 🧭 [Client] Shows direction and coordinates in the GUI/HUD with a compass in the inventory.

GUI Effect Timer.description: ⌛ Displays time remaining text inside the mob effect badge on the screen.

GUI Followers.description: 🐺 [Client] Shows a list in the GUI/HUD of all tamed non-sitting followers around.

Hand Over Your Items.description: 🤝 Adds to ability for in-game players to give each other itemstacks without dropping/tossing them.

Healing Campfire.description: 🔥🩹 Creates an area around the (soul) campfire where players and passive mobs receive regeneration.

Healing Soup.description: 🍲 [PvP Mod] Soup heals hearts. Adds recipes for chocolate milk, cactus soup and stew.

Hidden Recipe Book.description: 📗 [Client] Toggle the visiblity of the recipe book icon in the crafting GUI screen.

Hide Experimental Warning.description: ❌ Hides the Experimental Settings Warning when trying to create or load a modded world.

Hide Hands.description: 🙌 [Client] Hide your offhand and/or main hand in first person, optionally while holding specific items like a torch, totem of undying or a shield.

Hoe Tweaks.description: 🌾 Faster crop block breaking, increased hoe radius and the ability to un-till soil.

Humbling Bundle.description: ✖️2️⃣ Doubles all entity loot, to increase the speed of early game progress and late-game grinds. Inspired by the identically titled item in the binding of Isaac.

Husk Spawn.description: 🏜 Adds a chance for husks to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a zombie.

Ice Prevents Crop Growth.description: 🧊 Crops growing with ice underneath will remain in the same stage, for design purposes.

Improved Sign Editing.description: 🪵 [Client] Better sign editing functionality. Shift to the next and previous line during typing.

Infinite Trading.description: ♾ Prevents villager trades from locking up, making them always available. Trade away!

Inventory Mending.description: 📖🔧 Allows mending items inside the inventory to be repaired without being equipped.

Inventory Totem.description: 🎴 Makes the totem of undying effect work when it's anywhere in the inventory.

Just Mob Heads.description: 🗿 Adds a configurable chance for mobs to drop their head, using vanilla resources only.

Just Player Heads.description: 🗿 Allows the collection of player heads via command or death event.

Keep My Soil Tilled.description: 🌱 Keeps farmland soil tilled below a stem block (melon/pumpkin) after harvesting.

Kelp Fertilizer.description: 🌿 Kelp seaweed naturally filters sea water for rich nutrients. Kelp works like bone meal.

Let's Parkour.description: 🦘 Adds various parkour related blocks to create an awesome track, made for ModFest: Carnival.

Manure.description: 💩 Animals periodically drop manure, which can be used as a bone meal substitute.

Milk All The Mobs.description: 🥛 Allows sheep, llamas, pigs, donkeys, horses and mules to produce a bucket of milk.

Mineral Chance.description: 💎 Players can find minerals inside stone-type blocks when mining in the overworld and nether.

Mooshroom Spawn.description: 🐮🍄 Adds a chance for mooshrooms to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a cow.

Mooshroom Tweaks.description: 🐮🍄 Allows both red and brown mooshrooms to spawn naturally in their biome.

More Zombie Villagers.description: 🧟‍♀️🌾 Allows changing the default chance a zombie spawns as the villager variant.

Move Boats.description: 🛶 Allows players to easily move boats without breaking them.

Move Minecarts.description: 🛒 Easily pick up and move minecarts without breaking them.

Name Tag Tweaks.description: 📛 Adds nametag crafting recipe, command, and named entities drop their tag on death.

Named Areas (Forge).description: [Deprecated] Create custom named areas/towns with a radius or by biome using signs with messages via GUI or chat.

Natural Charcoal.description: 🔥🌳 Burned out logs have a chance to generate charcoal, which are immune to fire.

Naturally Charged Creepers.description: 🔋 Allows creepers to spawn charged in order to increase the game's difficulty.

Nether Portal Spread.description: 🔮 Spreads (nether) blocks to the overworld around nether portals in a configurable radius.

No Animal Tempt Delay.description: 😍 Removes the cooldown in between trying to attract animals with their desired food.

No Feather Trample.description: 🪶 Prevents farmland blocks from being trampled while having Feather/Slow Falling.

No Hostiles Around Campfire.description: 🔥 Prevents hostile mob spawns and burns them around the campfire in a configurable radius.

Nutritious Milk.description: 🥛 Adds nutritious value to milk, filling up the food bar and saturation when consumed.

Omega Mute.description: Ω [Client] The only mod you'll need to have full control over individual in-game sound.

Ore Discovery Broadcast.description: ⛏️ Broadcasts a message to the server whenever a player finds an ore vein.

Ore Harvester.description: ⛏️ Harvest entire ore veins instantly and drop ore items at the initial block position. An updated alternative to the vein miner / veinminer mods.

Overworld Piglins.description: 🐷 Makes Piglins and Hoglins be able to survive in the overworld, unless they're weakened.

Paper Books.description: 📑📕 Allows the creation of books with 9 paper.

Passive Endermen.description: 👍 Prevent an enderman from teleporting, placing/picking up blocks (griefing) and attacking when looked at.

Passive Shield.description: 🛡 The shield is hidden and provides protection passively when held idle in the offhand.

Persistent Inventory Search.description: 🔎 [Client] Makes search queries remain inside the creative inventory during tab switching and closing.

Pet Names.description: 🐈 Gives tamable baby animals a pre-defined name.

Piglin Names.description: 🐷 Gives all piglins a default or custom name to liven up the world.

Placeable Blaze Rods.description: 🕯 Makes blaze rods placeable as a custom block in the world, like end rods.

Player Death Kick.description: 💀 Kicks players on death with a customizable disconnect message.

Player Tracking.description: 🔎 A PvP mod that encourages raiding. Allows the tracking of players via special trackers.

Player Tracking Compass.description: 🧭 [PvP Mod] Adds a Tracking Compass, which can track the nearest player's location.

Pumpkillager's Quest.description: 🎃 SpookyJam 2022: Help out the Pumpkillager! With custom encounters, rewards and a boss fight you'll get immersed in the story. Spawn him by breaking a pumpkin in this spooky scary Halloween style mod!

Quick Paths.description: 🚶 Create long paths instantly by setting a start and end point.

Quick Right-Click.description: ✋ Adds a portable functionality to certain items, which allows for quick access without placement. Works with beds, crafting tables, ender chests and shulker boxes among others.

Quicksaving.description: 💾 Adds quicksave and quickload capabilities via F6/F8. Works interdimensionally and optionally client-side only.

Rain Be Gone Ritual.description: 🌧 Adds the ability to stop the rain via a multi-block structure ritual in survival.

Random Bone Meal Flowers.description: 🎲 Randomizes the flowers spawned by bonemeal, allowing all (modded) types to spawn everywhere.

Random Mob Effects.description: 🎲 Randomly assign a (modded) potion effect to all hostile mobs in the world.

Random Sheep Colours.description: 🎲 Gives new sheep spawns a random wool/fleece color based on a configurable list.

Random Shulker Colours.description: 🎲 Gives new shulker spawns a random shell color based on a configurable list.

Random Village Names.description: 🌆 All villages receive a randomized name, shown in the GUI via the Areas mod.

Realistic Bees.description: 🐝 Tiny bees, or big! Bigger group spawns and increased hive space.

Recast.description: 🎣 Automatically re-casts the fishing rod line for a player when an item is caught.

Recipe Commands.description: 💬 Receive the pattern and ingredients of any item recipe via chat commands.

Replanting Crops.description: 🌱 Automatically replants/replaces/reseeds crops harvested with a hoe by using the drops. Works with modded drops, carrots, potatoes, beetroots, netherwart, cocoa beans and wheat.

Respawn Delay.description: ⏳ [PvP Mod] Players enter spectator mode on death for a configurable amount of time.

Respawning Shulkers.description: 🟪 Shulkers will respawn at their death location after a configurable delay, farm shells sustainably.

SAM Library (Forge).description: The Spawn A Mob Library assists in efficiently changing and adding mob spawns.

Save and Load Inventories.description: 💾 Save and load player inventories or kits to self and others by using commands.

Scaffolding Drops Nearby.description: 🏗 When breaking a scaffolding block, all chained blocks will drop at the block's position.

Screenshot Compression.description: 📸 Automatically compress screenshots taken in-game to lower file size with various config options.

Serilum's Client Bundle.description: 📦 A mod bundle of all client mods Serilum has released, create your own experience!

Serilum's Customization Bundle.description: 📦 A mod bundle of customization mods Serilum has released, set up your modpack instance!

Serilum's Extra Bundle.description: 📦 A mod bundle of some uncategorized mods Serilum has released, add spice and silliness!

Serilum's QoL Bundle.description: 📦 A mod bundle of all quality of life mods Serilum has released, lovely convenience!

Serilum's RPG Bundle.description: 📦 A mod bundle of all RPG mods Serilum has released, add realism and immersion!

Serilum's Spawn Bundle.description: 📦 A mod bundle of all spawn mods Serilum has released, see different mob types!

Set World Spawn Point.description: 🌎 Allows setting an exact custom spawn point for (newly) created worlds and spawn tweaks.

Shadow Mounts.description: 🐎 SpookyJam 2024: Turn horses into their Shadow Variant via a unique saddle!

Shulker Drops Two.description: 🟪 Allows Shulkers to drop two or more shells and ignore their default drop chance.

Silence Mobs.description: 🙊 Silence or mute mobs and villager with The Silence Stick.

Silkier Touch.description: ⛏️✨ Extends Silk Touch functionality! Dragon eggs, spawners, cake, farmland and more!

Simple Menu.description: 🖼️ Adds some basic functionality to edit the style and buttons of Minecraft's main menu, change the window title and set a new icon. A less fancy FancyMenu alternative.

Skeleton Horse Spawn.description: ☠🐴 Allows skeleton horses to spawn naturally with a skeleton riding it and other tweaks.

Sleep Sooner.description: 🛌 Also Sleep Later! Make players go to bed at a different time.

Smaller Nether Portals.description: 🔮 Allows the creation of smaller nether portals, specifically 1x2, 1x3 and 2x2.

Snowballs Freeze Mobs.description: ☃️ Hitting mobs with a snowball will freeze them for a configurable amount of time.

Softer Hay Bales.description: 🌾 Makes hay bales negate fall damage entirely, Assassin's Creed style.

Spiders Produce Webs.description: 🕷 Spiders and cave spiders can periodically produce a cobweb/spiderweb when a player is close.

Spooky Jams.description: 🫙 SpookyJam 2025: Adds various craftable "Spooky Jams", which give effects when consumed.

Stack Refill.description: 📚 Automatically refills the player's hand when using the final item if a replacement exists.

Starter Kit.description: 📦 Give all new players joining the world configurable starter gear, items and/or potion effects. It can overwrite the initial inventory, or add the items after. Compatible with FTB Team Islands.

Starter Structure.description: 🏛️ Allows the creation of buildings on initial world generation at spawn via schematic files.

Sticky Enchanting Lapis.description: 📖🔷 Allows lapis lazuli to remain in the enchanting table and be shared among players.

Stray Spawn.description: ☠ Adds a chance for strays to spawn naturally everywhere in place of a skeleton.

Superflat World No Slimes.description: 🙅 Removes those pesky slimes when you're trying to be creative in a superflat world.

Surface Mushrooms.description: 🍄 Mushrooms can be placed on the surface in daylight and in any brightness.

The Vanilla Experience (Mod) (Forge).description: 🌳 A mod mirror of the identically named modpack. Bundles 107 of Serilum's mods together.

The Vanilla Experience | TVE.description: 🌳 A light custom-coded 26.1.1 vanilla+ modpack which is interchangeable with an unmodded save.

Thorny Bush Protection.description: 🫐 Players walking through berry bushes won't receive damage while wearing leggings.

TNT Breaks Bedrock.description: 🧨 Allows TNT to break bedrock, easy access to the nether roof!

Trample Everything.description: 🥾 A highly configurable mod which makes players trample everything, not just crops.

Transcending Trident.description: 🔱 Improves the trident. Hold a water bucket to use a more powerful riptide anywhere.

Tree Harvester.description: 🌲 Harvest full trees and huge mushrooms instantly with an axe. Includes fast leaf decay and sapling placement. Also works for warped (nether) trees. Become a master tree chopper quick in no time.

Underground Beacons.description: 🕳️ Allows beacons to function underground, no matter how many solid blocks are above it.

Underwater Enchanting.description: 🌊 Allows the use of the enchantment table under water with maximum levels via bookshelves.

Vanilla Zoom.description: 🔍 [Client] Adds an on-the-go zoom functionality hotkey using the spyglass item.

Village Bell Recipe.description: 🔔 Makes the village bell item craftable via a recipe.

Village Spawn Point.description: 🏙 Sets the spawn point in a new world to the center of a village.

Villager Death Messages.description: ⚰ Broadcasts an informational death message whenever a villager passes away.

Villager Names.description: 🧑‍🌾 Gives all villager entities a default or custom name to liven up the world.

Void Vanguards.description: 🛰️ ModJam 2025: A lore filled quest mod about conflict between The Vanguard and Voidborn.

Vote Command.description: 🗳 [Server] Adds a configurable /vote command which tells players how and where to vote.

Wandering Trader May Leave.description: 💨 Adds a button to the Wandering Trader's screen which makes it disappear without violence.

Weaker Spiderwebs.description: 🕸 Breaks spider webs/cobwebs with a configurable delay when walking through.

Welcome Message.description: ✉️ Easy to configure welcome messages for server players logging in with URL support.

What Durability?.description: ❌ Removes all durability from items, allowing infinite uses. Similar to Terraria and Stardew Valley.

Where Did I Die?.description: 🪦 Shows and screenshots the player's coordinates in the chat after death, fully client-side!

Wool Tweaks.description: 🐑 Makes various changes to wool-type block recipes, string conversion and the dyeing process.

World Border.description: 🌎 Allows the creation of a configurable world border, limiting the world size.

Your Items Are Safe.description: 💀 Spawns a chest and armor stand with player items on death, a gravestone alternative.

Zombie Horse Spawn.description: 🧟‍♂🐴 Allows zombie horses to spawn with a zombie riding it and other tweaks.

Zombie Proof Doors.description: 🧟‍♂ Prevents zombies from targeting and breaking down doors.

Zombie Villagers From Spawner.description: 🧟‍♂ Returns the ability for zombie spawners to spawn the villager variant, removed in 1.11.
